description: Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Upper Single piece leather upper covering the forefoot and midfoot for maximum durability, breathability and style Cushioned textile lining for added comfort Stitch detailing and metal eyelets for added strength Brand logo embossed on the strap Cushioned, leather footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfort with printed branding Upper stitched to outsole for maximum durability Outsole Curved TPU outsole in ergonomic design with leaf shaped seam and lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
